entry.title: Re: How to extend DRF SOAP Outbound Service with Custom Fields?
entry.content:
Hello,

Did you find out how to extend DRF to add custom fields to the XML ?

Thanks and best regards,

Greg

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi  @munirn,

It should work as described here: https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/devguide/deploy-apps/deploy-app.html#profile

If not, please create a ticket. It's always recommended to use our official support channels. 

Best regards, Gergana

entry.title: Planning in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - embedded analytics of plan and actual report
entry.content:
In previous blogs, we have posted planned revenue, cost and expenses, in this blog, we are going to custom develop a report via embedded Analytics Fiori apps to view the planned data and comparing with actuals.

System Walkthrough

Mockup report is going to be a condensed income statement plan actual comparison report.

Two CDS Views can be used, I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube and I_ActualPlanLineItemSemTag. Latter has some advantages as it contains semantic tags, together with financial statement versions offers easy maintenance when it comes to assign G/L accounts to reporting items. But for the demo purpose we will use the first one. Open Fiori app Custom Analytical Queries or the new app Custom Analytical Queries and Services. Choose Data Source.

In Field Selection, select fields of our interests

In Display, create Characteristics Structure, for example maintain Plan Category ACT01 for ActualAmount and Plan Category PLN for PlanAmount, alternatively, use Plan Category as an input filter.

Create Restrictive measures. For example: “Net Sales:” is just placeholder reporting item, we can use any fixed value with “*”.

For measure “Products”, we maintain G/L Account values based on Amount in Company Code Currency

Create calculated measures

After selecting the needed fields, creating all the necessary measures, setting up filters. Hit preview to view the report as a multidimensional report. At this point, the CDS view can be published and saved into a business catalogue, and the report can be operational.

To take advantage of embedded SAC features, use Fiori App Manage KPIs and Reports to further process the report. Select the CDS View created.

Create a table with the CDS view and adjust the layout, this is the same as in multidimensional report, some visual representations can be added here (not shown in the demo).

I created another page with G/L account (with FSV selection) as rows and standard measures in columns. This is what a standard P&L report would look like.

Summary

We have showed how to custom a report to view plan data. For more information about embedded Analytics features and more use cases, please refer to my colleagues’ blogs. Customer use case of Embedded SAC on Account Balan... - SAP Community

Feel free to leave questions or comments and explore other content and blogs. Your participation to the community is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Cross-Selling Being Unavailable After Vari...
entry.content:
Hi, I should have mentioned that SAP note. I didn't think the reasoning for not enabling Cross Selling for configured materials is valid for this scenario, since both the configuration and Cross Selling are supposed to work independently of each other. We also didn't get the error mentioned in the note or any error at all.

I would like to use Cross Selling for a material regardless of how it is configured. Is there perhaps another way around it to use both?

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Need help to configure Group Journa...
entry.content:
You can define the name of role yourself. There could be different root causes if it didn't arrive to your app 'My Inbox'. 

Open an incident with SAP to get help.

entry.title: Re: SD-Billing: In transacition v/25 the field "Procedure...
entry.content: With the standard configuration, it is not possible to achieve this requirement.  Check SAP note 432049 and implement the required logic in the user exit USEREXIT_KOMPBV3_FILL recommended in this SAP note and also take care of another SAP note 7563 which is mentioned in the same SAP note

entry.title: 1H 2025 Onboarding: Enhancements to the E-Verify Further Action Notice process
entry.content:
The E-Verify Further Action Notice (FAN) process is now fully integrated into the Onboarding module.

When there's an information mismatch resulting in an E-Verify Tentative Nonconfirmation (TNC) employment verification case result, hiring managers can now choose to complete the FAN process within the onboarding program or use the pre-existing offline process (such as in person). 

If the Department of Homeland Security can’t confirm the new hire’s work authorization, then the new hire's case receives a Mismatch - Tentative Nonconfirmation status. When a case has a Mismatch - Tentative Nonconfirmation status, the hiring manager receives a notification prompting them to notify the new hire about the TNC. The manager can complete this process offline or online within the system.

  • If the new hire's information is not correct, the hiring manager can cancel the compliance process and create a new E-Verify case.
  • If the Hiring Manager instead sends the FAN, they can now select Correct. This new option now creates an Onboarding task for the New Hire to complete the FAN process within the Onboarding module. This is called the Online TNC process.

If the manager selects the option to create an Onboarding task for the new hire, the New Hire Tentative Nonconfirmation Task Status section appears for the manager. The manager can return to this section to cancel this task up until the new hire uploads their signed FAN.

A Response to Further Action Notice task is added to the new hire's Your Onboarding Checklist page and an email notification is triggered. The email notifies the new hire about the TNC that must be resolved in 10 federal government work days. When the new hire opens this task, they are provided with a a case number and a reason for the mismatch TNC case result. They are asked to verify if the information provided by their employer is correct.

If they select the information is Incorrect, the correct Form I-9 process is triggered.

If they select the information is Correct, the Response to Tentative Nonconfirmation appears for the manager. The new hire can choose to take action to resolve the TNC or not take action and accept a Nonconfirmation case result.

If they select Do not take action to resolve this mismatch, the case is closed with a Final Nonconfirmation case result.

If they select Take action to resolve this mismatch, the Complete e-Signature on Compliance Form task appears on their Onboarding Checklist. When opened, this task displays the Further Action Notice and allows the new hire to choose a response and type their name in the signature field to sign the form before submitting it. When the new hire submits the signed TNC, the hiring manager is sent a notification prompting them to review the new hire's TNC. The manager downloads and reviews the new hire's TNC, and accept and confirms the new hire's response or closes the case. The confirmed case is submitted to the E-Verify service and moves into "Referred" status. The manager is prompted to deliver the Referral Date Confirmation (RDC) form to the new hire. The RDC provides the final deadline for an employee to contact the Social Security Administration (SSA) or Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to resolve a mismatch TNC case result.

With the 1H 2025 Release, you can now test this functionality within the Preview instance and see this workflow live for yourself! In Preview and Test tenants, a "mock" E-Verify service is used which mimics the responses of the E-Verify system. This functionality will go live with the Production release for all customers with E-Verify enabled, so it's critical you test this and also align your internal organizations with this new process.

As an example, you can test this flow by utilizing any test SSN which is in the format of NNN-78-NNXN:
--The first three numbers can be any value
--The second values must be "78" to avoid a Photo Match Case, and an Unconfirmed Case result.
--The last four digits can be any values, but "X" must be values 1-6 (to give the various SSA, DHS, and SSA+DHS Nonconfirmation results).

This enhancement directly integrates the E-Verify process for the manager and new hire in a simple, automated way that removes a lot of the previous manual work a manager needed to execute to complete an E-Verify Tentative Nonconfirmation Case. This enhancement automates much of that manual work, improves the overall security of new hire data, and allows new hires to take action and provide their E-Verify choices through Onboarding.


General Reminder: Update your Company's E-Verify Point of Contact!

While SAP/SuccessFactors as your E-Verify Employer Agent will manage and maintain the functionality of the E-Verify integration, there are still situations and cases where DHS, USCIS or E-Verify will want to reach out to you (the customer) directly.

Please update your company's E-Verify Point of Contact (POC) contact information for the POCs that no longer work for your company. You can update your point of contact by sending an email to SAP E-Verify Enrollment <everify.enrollment@sap.com>. Include the Point of Contact name, email, and phone number along with your Client ID (Client Company ID) which is found in your Admin Settings > U.S. Compliance > E-Verify Settings.

Disclaimer:

This presentation/post, or any related document and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice. The information in this presentation/post is not a commitment, promise or legal obligation to deliver any material, code or functionality.  This presentation/post is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. This presentation/post is for informational purposes and may not be incorporated into a contract. SAP assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in this presentation, except if such damages were caused by SAP’s intentional or gross negligence.

All forward-looking statements are subject to various risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from expectations. Readers are cautioned not to place undue reliance on these forward-looking statements, which speak only as of their dates, and they should not be relied upon in making purchasing decisions.

entry.title: How to use the underlying draft enabled enitity seperately in a Firoi List Report UI ?
entry.content:
Dear members,

I have Entity A  (odata.draft.enabled: true) root view entity with a composition to Entity B & Entity B has it Entity C as composition. I am projecting this with a Fiori List report in using CAP. Now I want to bring out Entity B (odata.draft.enabled: true)  and expose it as separate from another Fiori List Report UI. 

This is now not allowing me to create an entry as the entity B is already under the Entity A draft capability. This complains to me that DraftAdmistrationData_UUID cannot be null. 

How can I do that? 

db/schema.cds

Step1 : entity A {

sales: composition to Entity B 

}

Step 2: entity B {

salesitems: composition to Entity C

}

Step3: entity C {

}

Service1.cds

odata.draft.enabled : true

entity A

entity B

entity C

Service2.cds

odata.draft.enabled : true

entity B

entity C

The service2.cds does not allow me to create an entry from the object page. 

Any thoughts?

entry.title: Re: Optional Filter Variable appears as Mandatory in OData Service of an Analytical Model
entry.content: Hello, I don't have an answer as my analytical models do not have parameters. However, depending on how you are consuming this API, I have a follow-up question. To use the OData V4 consumption API, we need an OAuth client with the purpose 'Interactive Usage', right? But does this mean that a user context must be present in Datasphere itself, or am I mistaken? I am looking for a way to consume analytical model data using cron jobs running in a Kubernetes cluster. So, I’m trying to consume the DSP API as a robot user without any user setup. Is that possible?

entry.title: Re: Issue with Cross-Selling Being Unavailable After Vari...
entry.content: In the same SAP note which has been referred here, it is mentioned "This may be possible with a modification".  This means, you need to develop a custom logic with the help of your ABAP team

entry.title: Re: Issue with Cross-Selling Being Unavailable After Vari...
entry.content:
The SAP KBA is recently released and applicable to all SAP versions including S4 HANA.

There is a comment in the KBA to perform an Enhancement, May be you can write to SAP asking for some leads here. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
DATAMODELGENERATION

I expect Joule will do it faster than me)

entry.title: Does SAP B1 PLD Have a Hidden Business Partner Code for Account Balance?
entry.content:
SAP B1 v10

Hello,

I'm creating a custom layout for Account Balance in SAP Business One Print Layout Designer, and I noticed that two text fields display the customer name and customer account number, but they do not reference any database field.

Here is the data for these fields:

Field 1 (Customer Name)
- Unique ID: `F_021`
- Field Type: `Text`
- Link To: (Nothing)*
- Source Type: `Free Text`

Field 2 (Customer Account Number)
- Unique ID: `F_022`
- Field Type: `Text`
- Link To: (Nothing)*
- Source Type: `Free Text`

Despite being Free Text fields, `F_021` correctly outputs the customer name, and `F_022` correctly outputs the customer account number.

My Questions:*
1. How is SAP B1 PLD retrieving this data if these fields are set as Free Text?
2. Does SAP B1 internally map `F_021` and `F_022` to the Business Partner (`OCRD.CardCode`)?
3. Is there a hidden variable or system function that automatically fills these values?
4. How can I manually reference these fields if I want to use them elsewhere?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Unable to Generate PDFs in VA22
entry.content:
Can be directly in SPRO configuration

Sales and distribution / basic functions /output control /output determination /maintain output determination for sales documents

Select the output type used and ensure that the "Changes relevant for output" option is activated. Or you can modify the condition record, select your output type and look for the "Change Indicator" setting and ensure it is active

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP Custom Entity with Parameter not allowed
entry.content:
Hi there 

I'm sure you have already found the right answer

But in case anyone else gets here after googling the message Entity '&1': Parameter entity set '&2' cannot be used for read

After parametrizing your entity you need to add /Set at the end of the URI

Like, ../SomeName(Par1='value1',Par2='value2') wouldn't work but ../SomeName(Par1='value1',Par2='value2')/Set would

entry.title: Re: In C4C utilities, Do we have functionlaity to know th...
entry.content: Thank you for letting us know.! I coudn't find the view ISU_C4C_AUDIT_V . Is this need to be created? Does it cover all scenarios

entry.title: Re: Compensation - Error Report
entry.content:
Hi @Olga_Skarla 

There is no such report however you can use the Check Tool although I must warn it sometimes flags perfecty working custom formulas for syntax issues (which is the reason I only use this feature for myself and never in calls with customers).

https://me.sap.com/notes/2643643

You can also find a lot of content on specific error messages by doing a search by error message on the community. Example: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-troubleshoot-failing-variable-pay-employee-history-or-bonus/ba-p/13504809 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Fetch Compensation Design Worksheet Fields via Odata...
entry.content:
From : 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/2h-2024-release-highlights-for-the-compensation-module/ba-p/13903229 

 

 

API for Compensation Data (read)

Allows us to feed planning data to other systems in real time (I got the requirement in my most recent implementation). 

Detailed documentation can be found here on the API Hub, please find here an example. Please note that only columns marked as reportable in Design Worksheets will be available through REST API.

Enhancement official page

entry.title: Re: Reporte para Cobranza
entry.content:
Sauldos,

    - mis clientes cuanto me deben: query en JDT1, algo como esto:

SELECT SUM(T0."BalDueDeb"), T0."ShortName"
FROM JDT1 T0
INNER JOIN  OCRD T1 ON T1."CardCode" = T0."ShortName"
GROUP BY T0."ShortName"

   - quando fue su ultimo pago y: query en ORCT, algo como esto

SELECT MAX(T0."DocEntry"),
T0."CardCode"
FROM ORCT T0
INNER JOIN OCRD T1 ON T1."CardCode" = T0."CardCode"
GROUP BY T0."CardCode"

   - cuanto pago esa ultima vez: query en ORCT, algo como esto:

SELECT T0."CashSum" + T0."BoeSum" + T0."CheckSum" + T0."TrsfrSum"
FROM ORCT T0
WHERE T0."DocEntry" = [DocEntry de Query acima]

Hay que complementarlo con una lógica propia, como no considerar documentos cancelados.

entry.title: Issue Posting Service Invoice to SAP
entry.content:
Hi Ankit,

I hope you are doing well.

I am facing another error when trying to post a service invoice from Postman. The error message is as follows:

10000415 - Linked value Freshasi does not exist

Could you please help me understand the reason behind this? Since we are using a service invoice, there shouldn't be any batch or serial number involved.

Looking forward to your insights.

Thanks,
Urvish

entry.title: Re: COMP - To obtain Compensation Statement online
entry.content: @farhanahSA Not possible then, my above suggestions from my first reply still apply.

entry.title: Re: Create condition table for tax code or tax procedure
entry.content:
Hi,

Did you try to create a Condition Type as ZTAX/ZV2 and then maintain the Condition Records by T code MEK1? I hope this approach will fulfill your requirements.

Thanks,

Sanan Afridi

entry.title: Cds Documentation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am unable to find the documentation for the following CDS views in the S/4HANA 1809 section:

I_PurchaseOrder
I_PurchaseOrderItem
I_Supplier
I_Customer
I_Product
I_Stock
I_Material
I_Movement
I_ProfitCenter
I_GLAccountLineItem
I_SalesAnalysis
I_Project
I_ProjectNetwork
I_SalesCondition

If I check the CDS views at this link, not all the standard CDS views are documented like the ones mentioned above
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ee6ff9b281d8448f96b4fe6c89f2bdc8/8573b810511948c8a99c0672abc159aa.html?locale=en-US&version=1809.latest

Does anyone know how to perform a more in-depth search or where I can find official documentation for these views?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Seeking Insight: Salary Planning using Base Salary vs...
entry.content:
Hi @vrajhendhran 

It's not possible in standard and the way you did it is the only way.

We've had this on our internal SAP Professional Services enhancement wish list shared with the Product team for a few years now. 

I have never heard back from them on this particular item so for now it seems to be a stalemate but stay tuned over the next few years for potential flexibility added there. 

 

I'm pretty sure there must be an enhancement request on this already, can you check and add your customer vote there ? If you can't find any could you have your customer add one ?

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/92

Would appreciate if you can share here the enhancement link if you find an existing one or create a new one so I can share it and get more votes on it.

 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Does SAP B1 PLD Have a Hidden Business Partner Code f...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Answering all your questions: these are System Variables mapped by the ID, so you just need to set the ID with the corresponding value and the internal logic of PDL will fill it, for example:

Document Header Variables:

F_021: CardCode (Business Partner Code)
F_005: DocNum (Document Number)
F_002: DocDate (Document Date)
F_004: DocDueDate (Due Date)
F_007: NumAtCard (Customer/Vendor Reference Number)
F_024: CardName (Business Partner Name)
F_025: ContactPerson (Contact Person)
F_043: Comments (Remarks)
F_042: DiscountPercent (Discount %)
F_014: DocTotal (Document Total)
F_037: DocCurrency (Document Currency)
F_016: TaxSum (Tax Total)
F_039: DocTime (Document Time)
F_166: DocStatus (Document Status)

 

Best regards

entry.title: Migration from Subversion to Git in SAP Business Objects (BOE) – BI2025 Release
entry.content:
As part of the BI2025 release, SAP Business Objects (BOE) has made a significant change regarding its version management system. Historically, Subversion (SVN) was bundled with BOE as the default version control system. However, in response to evolving security standards, Subversion software will no longer be shipped with the BI2025 release. Consequently, the Version Management application will not function unless an alternative version control system is configured.

Although Subversion will no longer be part of the newer BOE releases, existing Subversion repositories from previous installations will remain intact. To ensure continuity and security, users are provided with two options:

  • Migrate from Subversion to Git – This is the recommended approach, offering improved version control, enhanced security, and seamless integrations with modern development tools.
  • Set up and configure your own Subversion software – For those who prefer to continue using Subversion, you may configure your own Subversion environment and link it to your existing repositories.

This blog post will guide you through the migration process from Subversion to Git using the migration tool provided by SAP. The tool is available for both Windows and Unix environments and can be found in the Collateral Folder within the BOE installation directory.

Migration from Subversion to Git:

Migrating from Subversion to Git involves setting up Git and running a provided migration script to convert the Subversion repositories into Git repositories. Below are the detailed steps for both Windows and Unix environments.

Prerequisites:

  • Install Python: Ensure that Python is installed, as it is required for the migration script to function correctly.

  • Install Git:

    • For Windows, download Git from Git SCM.
    • For Unix, use the following command to install Git. 
zypper install git

Install git-filter-repo: This tool is essential for migrating the Subversion repository to Git.

Windows Migration Steps:

  • Install Python and Git:
    • Ensure both Python and Git are installed properly.
    • Confirm Git installation by running the following command in Git Bash
git --version

  • Install git-filter-repo:

    • Download and install the git-filter-repo tool, which is required for repository migration

 

  • Verify Git Check-in:

    • In CMC -> VMS, perform a dummy Git check-in to verify that the system is correctly set up to work with Git. Be sure to select a document that is not part of any Subversion check-ins to avoid conflicts.

  • Modify BOE Version Management Settings:

    • Navigate to Central Management Console -> Applications -> Version Management Settings and switch the version control system from Subversion to Git.
    • Restart the SIA from the CCM (Central Configuration Manager)

  • Verify Git Check-in:

    1. In Central Management Console -> Version Management System, perform a dummy Git check-in to verify that the system is correctly set up to work with Git. Be sure to select a document that is not part of any Subversion check-ins to avoid conflicts.

Run the Migration Script:

  • Download the migration script from the BOE installation folder and place it in a local folder.
  • Execute the script:
    • Enter the administrator password when prompted.
    • Enter LCM as the username and provide the corresponding password.
    • Wait for the migration process to complete successfull
./migrateSVNtoGIT.sh <SVN_REPOSRITORY> <GIT_RPOSITORY>
Example:
./migrateSVNtoGIT.sh svn://localhost:3690/LCM_repository /gitrepo3

Unix Migration Steps:

  1. Install Python and Git:

    • Install Python and Git by running the following commands
zypper install python
zypper install git

  • Prepare the Migration Files:

    • Download and extract the migration package. The package should contain the following files
      • git-filter-repo
      • migrateSVNtoGIT.sh
  • Set Script Permissions
chmod 755 migrateSVNtoGIT.sh
  • Run the Migration Script
./migrateSVNtoGIT.sh <SVN_REPOSRITORY> <GIT_RPOSITORY>
Example:
./migrateSVNtoGIT.sh svn://localhost:3690/LCM_repository /gitrepo3
  • Monitor the Migration:
    • The migration process will begin, and you will be able to monitor the progress. Once completed, verify that the Subversion repository has been successfully migrated to Git.

Following the steps outlined above, you can easily migrate to Git or configure your own Subversion environment. The migration tool simplifies the process and ensures a smooth transition to modern version control practices.

For any further assistance, refer to the migration tool documentation available within the BOE installation folders.

entry.title: Can we fetch Plant based on Catalog roles / LDAP by using API?
entry.content:
I want to fetch the Plant, CB USER and Roles in API level by using user ldap, is it possible?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can we fetch Plant based on Catalog roles / LDAP by u...
entry.content:
There is no API currently with this functionality in the Identity and Access Management area. However, you have the opportunity to influence new developments and features. For any features which you wish to exist, you can simply submit a request for such. Please see the following KBA:

2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Thanks,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SD-Billing: In transacition v/25 the field "Procedure...
entry.content: Thanks for the quick answer. In Note 432049 I found what I expected:

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud: Direct Transfer...
entry.content:
Hi @BurakCON,

In order to migrate data directly from SAP ECC and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you need to use the SAP Migration Cockpit. The lowest supported release is ECC 6.0 (SAP NetWeaver 7.0).

I would recommend reviewing all the details and prerequisites here: Migrate Data Directly from SAP System

In addition, you can also explore the Staging Tables approach. To decide the best approach for your project, I would also recommend checking the available migration objects for each approach.

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: Automatic Good Receipt for Purchase Orders
entry.content:
There are several ways you can approach it 

1. if you are on S4 and using BTP --you can use the RPA functionality of BTP -connect with your BTP consultant 

2. Check api.sap.com and search goods receipt --you will find -

Automate Posting of Goods Receipt--you will find a template for goods receipt-- able to locate configuration guide for S4 and also ECC document (both options linked mentioned below)

https://api.sap.com/build?searchterm=Goods%2520Receipt

https://api.sap.com/package/09336ca53e5d47a988fc3521a4fc0fff/overview

3. You can use any RPA like UIpath to perform the receipt of the goods against the PO# line # and Qty maintained on Excel and put on share-point 

 

4. You can build a native App to upload the file and then process the file using goods receipt Apis

entry.title: Create Business Catalog to grant access to Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

 

We need to determine whether it is possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to create a custom catalog that grants access specifically to a Custom Business Object (CBO). If this is feasible, we require guidance on the process steps.

Thanks! 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Create Business Catalog to grant access to Custom Bus...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

It's not possible to create Business Catalogs in S/4HANA Cloud, therefore it's not possible to create a Custom Catalog for your Custom Business Object.

You can choose another Standard Business Catalog to add to your CBO if it's feasible for you...

 

Also, it's good to know that as of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2502, the new feature "IAM apps of the app authorization variant type" is available.

With this, the activation/deactivation of IAM apps of type "app authorization variants" in a business role is now possible based on assigned business catalogs. The assignment of individual IAM apps of type "app authorization variants" directly to business roles is available.

This means you can now choose which applications will be accessible in a Business Role by activating/deactivating the applications inside the roles. Therefore, you can control the access of applications despite the assigned catalogs. 

 

Please refer to What's New for more information IAM App - App Authorization Variant and especially documentation:

  • Business Roles, Business Catalogs, App Authorization Variants, Restrictions | SAP Help Portal
  • Work with IAM Apps of the App Authorization Variant Type | SAP Help Portal
  • Effects of Using IAM Apps of the App Authorization Variant Type | SAP Help Portal

 

For your reference, please check SAP Note 2633830 - No Option To Create Business Catalogs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: How to run BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC without commit?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

How to run BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC without commit?

Or mb there is another fm/bapi for delivery split?

entry.title: How does Pacemaker handle the log full error.
entry.content:
We are in the process of implementing Pace Maker on our environment. The Hana System Replication is already setup. There are only two instances. One is Primary and the other is Secondary. The purpose of setting Pacemaker is to automate the process of failover. 

The question we have is that how does Pacemaker behave when we have disk full (and/or) log full situation. Would the Pacemaker automatically failover to the Secondary if the Primary becomes unavailable due to Log full or Disk Full situation.

The Hana Version we are using is 79.02 and the OS is RHEL 9.4

Any input is greatly appreciated

entry.title: Re: 🎉SAP Build Brings Generative AI to Process Automation to enable your Business Processes
entry.content: Thanks for the tutorial @yogananda! 👍🏻

entry.title: Event Based Production and WIP reversal
entry.content:
We have customer scenario in Event-based WIP. The customer wants to reverse the Material before the teco in case there has been some specification changes or for any reason. In event-based once we do the GR the WIP is closed and we are not able to see that back . since the manufacturing cycle is longer they would want to have a view of the WIP and also as a part of financial reporting they require this.

Is there any way we can reverse the material after GR to WIP back. 

than you

entry.title: Integration Center not fetching records - RCM Background check
entry.content:
Hi

We have set up the standard third party integration with our background check vendor.The background check runs successfully but integration center job keeps saying "No Records found for integration; job finished without generating any output " and candidates do not exit SF  to land up on the vendor dashboard.

What does the message indicate?Is there some config missing or is this a problem on the vendor's side?

Please can you help here.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: EOIO in SAP CI Using JMS - Exclusive Mode
entry.content: Thats a great feature, but I dont see it in the JMS adapter in my Tenant, any pointers there ?

entry.title: MRP run not to consider batches with expiry date
entry.content:
Dear team

We want to run MRP for 6 months and we do not want MRP to consider batches which are going to expire in 6 months in future.

 

BR

Ramesh Kumar

entry.title: Calculating Time Interval between Two Time Feilds
entry.content:
SAP Datasphere #TimeInterval

Hi All,
I have requirement to calculate the time interval between two Time Feilds in Graphical View using Calculated Column
There are 4 Dimension for a requirement with data in below format. I need to calculate time interval between Process Order Start Time and Finish Time in Hours. I have tried various function but it's not giving accurate results. Can anyone help me to calculate the expected results.

Process Order Actual Start DateProcess Order Actual Finish DateProcess Order Actual Start Time (HHMISS)Process Order Actual Finish Time (HHMISS)Time Interval between Process Order Start Time and Finish Time in hrs (Expected Result)
20250106202501071641440000008
202501072025012206393300000018
20250117
20250117
000000
093135
9

entry.title: Registration For SAP Sapphire Virtual In 2025 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
It’s that time of year again! This year’s SAP Sapphire Virtual is taking place on May 20-21, 2025, and you can be there to discover how SAP helps businesses go beyond the AI hype to bring out real results. Our annual two-day flagship interactive event is accessible to everyone. 

Here’s what you can expect

SAP Sapphire is all about SAP's strategic vision, innovations, and industry-leading solutions in action. By joining the virtual experience, you can gain the insights and expertise needed to advance your career from the comfort of home, and help your organization thrive using SAP technologies. Get ready to learn from industry leaders, discover best practices from SAP experts and partners and explore the latest technology shaping the future of business. 

  • Discover how SAP Business Suite helps realize your full potential 
  • Experience real stories about SAP driving digital transformation 
  • Connect with our global community to learn and share strategies 

The packed agenda includes access to live content from the SAP Sapphire show floor in Orlando, including livestreamed keynotes, exclusive interviews, and interactive sessions, and on-demand content available at any time.  

Choose your Path: Three SAP Sapphire Virtual tracks to choose from 

At SAP Sapphire Virtual, you can dive deep into three event tracks providing numerous sessions per track, easy navigation and alignment to in-person tracks, each offering a variety of sessions and formats:  

  • Business Applications 
  • Business Technologies and  
  • Transformation and Adoption 

Level up with learning and SAP Certification  

Stay tuned to learn more about how registrants can access and benefit from the SAP Sapphire Virtual learning zone with curated learning content and experiences, as well as access to a community of experts. Get ready to acquire in-demand skills and prepare for a globally recognized SAP Certification to boost your career.  

Register now for SAP Sapphire Virtual 2025 and shape the future of business 

Register now for our premier flagship event to explore SAP's strategic vision, groundbreaking innovations, and industry-leading solutions in action. Plus, you can take advantage of an exclusive package of curated learning, engagement, and solution experience offerings—all designed to help you stay ahead in today's fast-moving business landscape.​ Join business leaders and decision-makers at SAP Sapphire Virtual in 2025 and stay tuned for an immersive learning experience to expand your expertise and accelerate your career.​ 
 
See you all at SAP Sapphire Virtual!

entry.title: Re: Report Utilization
entry.content:
Hi @Melissa_S , hope you're doing great.

Please check below KBA, which brings an overview about the possibilities of Report Usage through the different types of reports available in SuccessFactors:

2499914 - Usage statistics / Audit log for Reports

Best Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: MM_PUR_S4_PR~MODIFY_ITEM Contract for limit missing in importing parameters
entry.content: Hi there --- I hate to ask, but why do you need to do this enhancement in the first place? What are the purchase requisitions being created for? Do they have a material master number? I'm just wondering if you could solve all of this by implementing source lists as opposed to doing the enhancement. I'm not much help on ABAP though ! Thanks!

entry.title: SEN on prem fails create project with "now write permission"
entry.content:
Hello,

We run SEN on prem (older version).

1 producer user goes to create a project in a group.  goes to group and right clicks, chooses new project.
They get an error message that starts with "no write permission"

backstory, seems their password had expired, went to manager, reset the password, checked, they are standard author there, have worked in the workarea before.

notified them of the password, they connected to manager in producer, did a synch.

still same error.

Asked them to reboot workstation, retry, same error.

Any thoughts/items for me to check?

Best Regards, Wallace

SAP Enable Now, author option  SAP Enable Now

entry.title: test
Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content:
@ArjenVHooydonk Thanks for your comment. We have a phased roll-out of new Dcs happening this year as of now (March 19th), the DCs from US, Switzerland, and Australia are available. Germany is planned for the end of March (remaining roll-outs planned for this year). In your case (which we already discussed), you had a system in the DC from Germany which will be re-provisioned to the new stack as soon as the DC is ready. 

And regarding your other comment about "comparison of documentation", we will take that feedback to our teams and check internally if this can be improved.

entry.title: Re: First look into SAP Datasphere's new version control functionality
entry.content: Thanks Simon !

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content:
@MatthiasL Same answer as above. We have a phased roll-out of new Dcs happening this year as of now (March 19th), the DCs from US, Switzerland, and Australia are available. Germany is planned for the end of March (remaining roll-outs planned for this year). 

It is part of our plan to start re-provisioning systems that are not yet used. We will start this in Q2 2025 and will proceed based on the DC availability. If you have further questions, please do reach out to us.

entry.title: The order quantity should not be confirmed after the sales order is saved.
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am getting an issue at after saving the sales order confirmed quantity should not picked.

At the time of creating the sales order, the confirmed quantity should be allocated for this order. In the below screenshot could you refer to it?

But, after saving the sales order, the confirmed quantity should be showing zero value, Please suggest any solution for this issue.

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content: @MarcoSchramp Thanks for your understanding. As I mentioned above, the DC from Germany is targeted to be available around end of March, 2025.

entry.title: Re: In Integration Center, need help in filtering the pay...
entry.content:
Hi @niyatijain2 , hope you're fine.

Below is a logic that worked before, but was not tested recently.

Please check if you have tried to create your configuration like this, and then confirm if this suggestion can help you:

1 - Create a Calculated Field:

In your Integration Center job, add a new Calculated Field.
Name it "LowerCaseEmail" or something similar.
Use the following formula to convert the email to lowercase:
LOWER(email), Where email is the name of your original email field.

2 - Set up the Filter:

In the "Filters" section of your Integration Center job, create a new filter.
Use the following condition:
LowerCaseEmail ENDS_WITH '@gmail.com'

*LowerCaseEmail is the name of your calculated field from step 1.


3 - Apply the Filter:

Ensure the filter is activated for your job.
This should work restricting the data to only include records where the email (in lowercase) ends with '@gmail.com'.

****************

Regards,

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content: @wilcoxt Thanks for your comment. We are in touch with all of our partners with previously approved add-ons and have so far listed on the new KBA 3553185, the ones that have been expressly declared as compatible with the new stack. In case of the add-on you mentioned, we are still waiting for the partner's input and once we have it, we will list it on the new KBA. If a partner does not declare compatibility, we will not be able to list such an add-on for the new stack.

If a recruiter is searching on LinkedIN and would like to add a potential candidate they found  into SF recruiting to send out an email campaign or add to a talent pool to is there a connection for this? How would you get them into SF recruiting if they did not actually apply to a requisition?

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content: @Jan_Duthoo Thanks for your comment. Please reach out to us to discuss the details. We are currently aware of the KSA projects and are working with the involved teams.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Assignment of Sold-To Partner in STO Delivery (NL)
entry.content: Can you post what you see on partner functions of customer you assigned to you plant in T001W table ?-- as far i understand customer assigned in the STO settings will be the partner on delivery document --please share some screenshots of Delivery created via VL10B and manually you what value you entering and what you have in T001W table ?

entry.title: Generic Withholding Report
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there somewhere that I can find what the generic withholding reports look like and what fields are included for LATAM countries?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Create condition table for tax code or tax procedure
entry.content:
if your requirement is to default the tax code on the invoice here few steps you can tax 

1. You can make use of info records if you are comfortable with it 

2. or you can default tax code based on a condition type or condition table (what parameters will define the tax code)-- to determine the tax code in the PO--here is an example and steps for achieving that requirement 

1. Create a condition table(999) with the Key Combination Plant/Vendor/Tax Code in t.code: M/03

2. Create an access sequence(ZTX1) in M/07 and assign condition table(999)

3. Create condition type ZTX1 ( a copy of MWST) and assign access sequence(ZTX1) in it(M/06).

4. Keep new Condition type ZTX1 maintained in the Pricing Procedure(M/08).

5. Now, maintain the Condition Record in t.code; MEK1 with Condition type ZTX1 and keep

your Plant/Vendor/Tax Code.

Now, when you create a Purchase Order with a combination of company code and plant, the tax code will be defaulted on the invoice tab.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Plan Delivery Time for Purchase requisition i...
entry.content:
Hello

I don't think you can influence the planned delivery time with variant configuration. 

BAdI MD_MODIFY_SOURCE allows you to use your own logic to determine the planned delivery time.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Payment term 001 not defined - Message No. F5839
entry.content:
Hi, 

You configured 0001 but error is for 001 -> this is different (001 NE 0001). Please configure 001.

entry.title: Re: Poland KSeF - Full Walk through
entry.content:
Hi, 

walk through You can fin in this note. 3279206 - Electronic Document Processing for Poland - KSeF: Implementation Overview

SAP solution is based on DRC.

entry.title: Tax code and Tax jurisdiction codes in ML81N
entry.content: We create service purchase orders with unplanned services and indicate the tax code and tax jurisdiction code on the purchase order.  When doing a service entry (ML81N) the tax codes/jurisdiction codes do not always populate the tax code/jurisdiction codes that are indicated in the purchase order.  Especially if there are multiple lines on the PO with differing tax codes/jurisdiction codes.  Is there a BADI or 'something' that would force the tax code/jurisdiction codes from the referenced PO/line item into the service entry sheet?  My Programmer can't seem to make it work...any assistance would be appreciated.!!

entry.title: test
Re: G/L Accounts not transported from DEV to TEST
entry.content:
Please check answer from this topic. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/transport-of-g-l-accounts-in-3sl/qaq-p/12593845

entry.title: Creating a CBO with CRUD operations | SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Introduction
Creating a Custom Business Object (CBO) in Public Cloud, from the initial setup to enabling CRUD operations. This includes communication scenario, arrangement, and catalog association. A simple process to enable customizations in the environment.


Step 1 - Creating the CBO (Custom Business Object)
Access the Custom Business Object app.



Create a new CBO.

 

 

 


To enable future CRUD access, select this option.
Add the required fields, define data types and keys, then click Publish.


Step 2 - Creating the Communication Scenario
Access the Custom Communication Scenarios app.


Create a new Communication Scenario.

 

 




Define a name and description.

Save and publish.





Step 3 - Creating the Communication Arrangement
Access the Communication Arrangements app.



Create a new Communication Arrangement.

 

 




Associate it with the previously created Communication Scenario.



Select the Communication System (e.g., ZLOCAL, already pointing to the environment).

 

 




Publish.


Step 4 - Linking Communications to the CBO
Open the previously created CBO.
In the Inbound Services tab, add the created service.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 



The Communication Arrangement is now associated.

 



Step 5 - Assigning the CBO to a Business Catalog
Access the Custom Catalog Extensions app. 



Locate the two objects that need to be linked to a Business Catalog (IBS and SCBO).

 






 

 



 

 




Publish.


Step 6 - Accessing the CBO CRUD (SM30 Equivalent)
1- Accessing through the CBO. Click in Go To Generated UI

 



2- Searching via apps.

 



Step 7 - Result
Click in Create to create a record.

entry.title: Re: Conditional Emails in Recruiting
entry.content:
No, you cannot have conditional emails based on questions. Only one email template can be associated with each applicant status. To achieve this, you would need two different applicant statuses one with an email and one without. You can then automate candidate movement using a business rule or integration.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
The Joule for developers capability you found first - Generation
From Joule's generation capability i can automate SAP CAP (Cloud Application Programming) code creation, accelerating development by generating entities, services, and Fiori elements. This enhances efficiency, reduces errors, and streamlines project setup.

entry.title: Re: Tables and Fields for Stock - Multiple Materials modu...
entry.content:
Hello -- please also could you give details on these fields:
Special Stock type
Material
Material Description

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud version 2 blank page
entry.content: Click Settings, make a user with more rights and lock this down as per the on-boarding guide.

entry.title: Releasing "requests" | In-App Mode (Custom Objects) | SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Introduction

In Public Cloud, the customization transport process differs from Private Cloud (STMS). The request is now called Collection. When transporting objects in In-App mode, each modification generates a new version within the Software Collection. You can add only the modified items, include comments, and use filters to streamline the search process. After importing the collection into the Test environment, performing the Forward action is necessary to make it available for import into PRD.

Step 1
Access the Export Software Collection app.



Create a Software Collection (if one does not already exist for the relevant topic or module/organization in the environment).


Name your Software Collection and click Create.

Once the Software Collection is created, note that it is versioned. This means that with every object modification and transport, a new version is automatically created for transport.




In Add Items, you can select the objects to be included in this Collection for transport.


Support Filters are available to assist with object searches within the environment.



After adding the desired objects, click Check to verify if there are any blockers, dependencies, or inconsistencies for transport.


Check Option
Note: It is possible to transport only the modified items or all items again. The first option is always recommended.



A log is generated at the end, displaying the transport status.


Export Option – This is where the release (Export) to the Test environment actually takes place.

 

A comment can be added for each versioned transport.



A log is generated at the end, displaying the transport status.

 


Step 2
After exporting, log in to the Test environment and access the Import Collection app.


Use the available filters to search for the desired collection. Upon reaching the Test environment, the versioned collection will have the status "Ready for Import."


Select the desired versioned collection and choose Check and Import.



Add a transport comment.



Click Manual Import.

The import process starts, and the collection status changes to "Importing" during processing.

 



 



Once the import is complete, a confirmation message is displayed:


Step 3
The collection has only been imported into the Test environment but is not yet available for import into the Production environment.

To make it available for import into PRD, it is necessary to perform the Forward action.

 


Select the collection and click Forward.

 



The collection is forwarded to the Production environment transport path.

 


To finalize, log in to the Production environment and access the Import Collection app.

 




Select the desired collection and import it.

 



The collection has been successfully imported into the PRD environment.

entry.title: Re: How to register an S/4RFQ to be linked to Sourcing
entry.content:
ME41 is still available in S4 but the S4 way to do is to use S4 Fiori Apps -

1, Manage RFQ--to create RFQ and Invite vendors (S4 creates only one document compared to each document with ME41 in ECC)

2. Once the Vendor has the response --You use Manage Supplier Quotations (instead of ME47)

3. You use the Compare Quotation app to compare vendors and award the quotation to the selected vendor 

4. Create a PO from the awarded quotation 

5. Close the RFQ once awarded 

Note -- S4 Manage RFQ does not support item category D-- you should be lean services if you are using service procurement or have use of getting RFQ or quote for item category D.

You can read more about RFQ -https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/f16d85d2491247a98c403654210adfd3.html

entry.title: How to Enable Joule Capabilities in SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
SAP recently announced some new Joule capabilities for developers within SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Apps. If you’re wondering how to enable these capabilities in your workspace, you’re in the right place.

In this post, we’ll look at the steps to undertake to enable the AI capabilities. But first, let’s just recap the announcement and the various recent posts:

  • Joule for developers, announced on March 18, is a set of AI capabilities enabled by Joule across SAP Build and ABAP developer tools.
  • Read the announcement blog here
  • Read the technical blog here
  • Read the FAQs on Joule for developer here

Now, lets look at the steps to enable the AI capabilities in SAP Build:

1. On the Build homepage, click Control Tower in the left-hand navigation panel.

2. Select Generative AI from the settings canvas.

3. Toggle the Enable AI button

 

4. Read and accept the SAP AI terms

5. Verify that the AI features are enabled

Availability and Licensing

Joule capabilities for developers are currently available across SAP Build Code, ABAP, SAP Build Process Automation, and SAP Build Apps.

Good news! Now through the end of June, we’re making Joule capabilities for developers accessible for free to all developers using SAP Build and ABAP Development Tools. For all SAP Build development tools, this free period extends until the end of June 2025. The ABAP AI capabilities will be available for free until August 2025. The only requirement to take advantage of this free offer is for the organization/user to sign the SAP AI Terms. Once this free offer concludes, the commercial model based on AI Units will take effect.

Note: You will still need the license to use the underlying SAP Build solutions and ABAP to utilize the AI capabilities within those tools.

Start leveraging the power of AI today! Enable Joule for developers in your SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Apps environments and experience a significant boost in your development efficiency. Don't miss out on the free offer available for a limited time!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud version 2 blank page
entry.content: Hi, The onboarding guide does not contain any clear steps. Also, the only available option in the settings is "Users" and I have already created one, but it is not able to log in, showing an "Incorrect username or password" error.

entry.title: Re: Proxying as an associate
entry.content:
Hi @mdudley2 

As per KBA 3511497, currently the "Launch Proxy" action (Learning Administration > People > Users > Actions) will display the legacy Learning home page, even with the "New Learning Experience" toggle on for the user being proxied.

There have been some enhancements requests on it, and our customers are welcomed to vote for them and/or create additional requests:

  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/322383
  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/322521/?section=sectionDetails 

For more details on enhancement requests, please check the KBA 2090228 - How to submit enhancement ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products.

Also, follow the Learning news at SAP SuccessFactors What's New Viewer.

entry.title: Re: Envision the Future of Generative AI with SAP's AI Agents
entry.content: It's striking how difficult it can be to shift some clients away from their entrenched, customized business models, even when presenting clear explanations and diagrams of SAP's best practice processes. Now, to effectively promote SAP's new AI solutions, I suggest developing content that addresses the client's perspective, focusing on the human-psychological elements of change and how to effectively communicate the benefits of these solutions.

entry.title: SAP CIDS Certification / Study Material
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am an SAP IBP/PP Consultant. I would like to know about CPIDS or CIDS Material for certification. As i don't see any specific code for CIDS in Learning Hub what would be the alternative option to learn CIDS. As i mostly work on the SAP IBP integration topics with S4 Hana/ECC. Expectation is to learn the CIDS functionality from the beginning step by step. I am interested in the front end ( Extractors, Mapping, RFC's Source to Target systems) not on the Background technical connectivity or installation part.

Would be really great if some one can guide me to learn CIDS or to share some study Material.

Regards

Krish

entry.title: Re: Map Account Creation Fields at the Career Portal to C...
entry.content: The country code on the profile page will populate only if SMS integration is enabled. Otherwise, it will be stored only in the backend database and used solely for duplication checks. There is no way to display this standard field on the profile without enabling SMS integration.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud version 2 blank page
entry.content: Give it the role: https://help.sap.com/docs/CX_NG_SVC/973e02cfd684464a90afffdb608dab63/0d77977a86114f0188ad4987f8be907d.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Will there be an option to hide the toggle and default to the legacy workbench during 1H 2025 Releas
entry.content: We would like to hide the new applicant workbench and default to the legacy workbench or at least set the default to the legacy workbench.  Will they have the option to hide the toggle or to set the default for the workbench during the 1 H 2025 release?

entry.title: Report layout not being used in batch email
entry.content:
Hello all,  we have create a Z report as a copy of S_ALR_87012182.  This is because we needed to add fields and the ability to email. 

I created a layout and set it as the default.  I then created a variant with that layout and assigned it in the batch job.  

When we use the email option either upfront or in batch, the report is received but is not the layout in the variant.  In addition, the report in the email or in download had the field names as column headers rather than the description.  IE the column header says KUNNR instead of customer number.  

Is there something we're missing to get this report to email in the layout we want?  Is it maybe the way the ALV is set up?

Thank you

Cheryl Tackett

entry.title: Re: Functional Currency differs from Company Code Currency
entry.content:
Hi Venu,

Thank you for the reply. I have further question. 

I assume at the time of release it will use the valid exchange rate maintained in the system. For exchange rate differences, how does the system account for this in the material valuation? It could be at the time of release the exchange rate between HUF and USD, is for example 0.10, the standard cost at the time of release is 1000 HUF > 100 USD but after a month it became 0.23 with standard cost still @ 1000 HUF but USD value now is 230 USD. (HUF is local currency while USD is the functional currency) How does the system account for this exchange rate differences?

Regards, 

Derek

entry.title: Golden transactions in SAP S/4 Professional Services
entry.content:
Hi All,

We will soon be going live with S/4 Professional Services. We have a complex set of integrations going to & from SAP. Over the weekend prior to Go-Live, once the integrations are on, we are planning to run a set of transactions in Production to ensure the integration flows work as expected. We are currently thinking-thru the best approach for this i.e. postings on a dummy project OR identifying a live-project and making some (unreal) postings on it which can be reversed later.

Will be keen to you if other professional services firms would have done the same thing and if so, what approach was used to execute the tests?

 

Thanks,

Payal

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Viewing application profile from candidate's perspective
entry.content:
As an admin, you can control the permissions for fields displayed in the candidate profile and application through Manage Templates in the Admin Center.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: IDOC metadata change on SAP backend - Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on IDOC to IDOC scenario on BTP Cloud Integration(CI) where our receiver system is also another CI which is on another subaccount ...IDOC metadata has been changed on SAP backend.. we need to adapt the IDOC schema changes on Cloud Integration to synchronize the schema on both SAP Backend & CI.. should we ask SAP backend colleagues to share XSD (or) WSDL? which is better practice) if they share XSD/WSDL then should we also the share the same with receiver BTP CI system contact? 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Re: Resource not found for segment 'Purchaseorder'" in Pu...
entry.content:
Hi, 

please check this note 2743849 - Resource not found for the segment 'XXXXXXXX'

entry.title: Re: Deployment Scheduling in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @Shadab101,

The Deployment Scheduler supports CTS-managed transports only. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is not supported since those transports are managed by Adaptation Transport Organizer (ATO). The support of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is not planned for this year and I cannot communicate any time-plan yet.

Best regards,

Moritz

entry.title: Problems with the service layer in the Order POST
entry.content:
I use this endpoint
POST: http://xxxxxx:50003/b1s/v1/Orders
with this JSON

 

{

    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",

    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",

    "SalesPersonCode": -1,

    "Rounding": "tNO",

    "DocumentSubType": "bod_None",

    "Series": 13,

    "Comments": “Test",

    "DocumentLines": [

        {

            "ItemCode": "A00001",

            "PriceAfterVAT": 1785.0,

            "Quantity": 1.0,

            "TaxCode": "IVA",

            "WarehouseCode": "01"

        }

    ]

}

The response is :

{
    "error": {
        "code": -1,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "BadFormat"
        }
    }
}
I changed the json to something simpler, but the error is the same.
{
    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",
    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "Quantity": 1.0
        }
    ]
}
The product and business partner exist and are active
What's the problem? What am I missing?

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Hi @Henric,

This topic has been discussed but it's not yet on the roadmap. I will revive the discussion.

Best regards,

Moritz

entry.title: Re: OData Network Error when Using "SAP Build Apps Preview" Android APP (WebApp preview wo
entry.content:
I Solved this changing all the OData integration for SAP Business One Service Layer REST API connection.

But now i'm having the same problem with Service Layer API in SAP Preview APP or Android Build.
Changed to HTTP Request same problem

Web Preview works Fine GET, POST, PATCH

Hope experts can help me.

entry.title: Re: AP Invoice IDOC Posting in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, 

idea of intercompany is to create invoice automatically between companies. If You don't want this then You should have different process.

entry.title: Re: How to map SAP ERP fields to SAP BW/4HANA InfoObjects?
entry.content:
It was nice article for BW Consultants.

Kindly share the list of BW/4HANA Info Objects mapping with S/4 Fields. I'm sharing mail with you.

hafizabdulsaboor1995@gmail.com

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Rollout New Country in SAP Public cloud
entry.content: You need to create new project and rollout this to production.
